title: Munch & Crunch Dog Treats Knotted Bones 6" 100% Natural Rawhide 4 Pack
features: Made from 100% natural rawhide with no artificial colours or preservatives
Helps reduce plaque and tartar build-up to support dental health
Long-lasting chew keeps dogs engaged and satisfies natural chewing instincts
Ideal size for medium to large breed dogs
description: Product description Give your dog a delicious and satisfying chew with Munch & Crunch Knotted Bones, made from 100% natural rawhide. This pack includes 2 packs of 2 bones, each measuring 6 inches—perfect for medium to large breed dogs. These long-lasting chews support natural chewing instincts while helping to reduce plaque and tartar build-up for healthier teeth and gums. With no artificial colours or preservatives, these treats are a wholesome way to reward your dog and keep them engaged and happy. Indications Adult Ingredients Rawhide Directions Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. May be fed at any time of the day as a treat or reward. Please adjust the main meal accordingly. See more
